title: assistant
description: a mod that tames zombies into assistants
body:
this mod adds in assistants
in order to get an assistant right click a zombie with a torch flower
this mod is bassically for people who want a zombie as a "pet" for some reason


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

right click with a bone to make your assistants switch between following you and staying in place

right click with a sword to make your assistants switch between attacking whatever attacks you/you attack and just following you (assistants will follow you if no target is set)

</details>
